scope: No-write preview for current online Merchant required-attribute issues using exact product IDs and local Shopify Data Spine evidence

approval_contract.what_lucas_would_approve_later: Only after a separate approval packet: write exact suggested attributes for exact current product IDs, with rollback snapshot and no broad query/wildcard updates.
hard_guards_for_future_executor: load exact candidates from final JSON only
abort if any candidate lacks Shopify exact active SKU evidence
do not modify local channel/POS rows
verify attributes and diagnostics after Content API delay
